auth.explainer.body1: An end-to-end encrypted messenger that runs only on this device. The server sees ciphertext only — never plaintext.
auth.explainer.body2: Heads up: there is no backup, no recovery, no password reset. If you lose the device or wipe the browser, your messages and handle are gone for good. To move to another device you have to run the transfer flow from this one.
auth.restore.label: saved session
auth.form.handle.hint: lowercase, digits, _ only. Cannot be changed once set.
auth.wipe: wipe all keys and cache from this browser
newChat.title: new direct chat
newChat.sub: Enter the peer handle. They have to be registered on the same server.
msg.empty.title: no messages yet
msg.empty.sub: use the input below to send the first one
msg.input.placeholder: Message (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
msg.confirmDelete.title: delete message
msg.confirmDelete.body: This message will be deleted. The recipient will also see a deleted-marker.
